title: clerodendrum abilioi
intro: Clerodendrum abilioi, also known as the Abilio's glory bower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum abilioi include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum abilioi can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
